Footer.tagline: The comprehensive e-commerce logistics platform. From factory to customer's door.

Hero.headlinePrefix: Empowering everyone to start, grow, and scale their
Hero.headlineSuffix: in the Middle East, Africa, and beyond 🚀
Hero.subtitle: COD Network is your trusted logistics partner. From the factory to the customer's door, we take care of everything. You focus on what you do best: selling and marketing! 💼

ProblemSolution.subtitle: We've built the complete solution so merchants can focus on growth, not logistics.

Services.title: Our Services at a Glance
Services.sourcingDesc: We find the best suppliers and factories for you. Quality inspection, best prices, and flexible payment terms.
Services.customsDesc: Our team handles all complexities. Customs letters, inspections, permits - 100% legally compliant.
Services.warehouseDesc: Modern warehouses with cooling systems and security. Your inventory is safe and protected.
Services.callCenterDesc: Local dialect speaking staff. They confirm, upsell, and handle objections efficiently.
Services.shippingDesc: Same-day fast delivery in select areas. Real-time tracking and professional drivers.
Services.remittanceDesc: Receive your profits instantly. Secure digital wallet and quick transfers without hidden fees.

Testimonials.title: Real Success Stories
Testimonials.t1: My sales increased by 300% in 3 months
Testimonials.t2: Expanded from Egypt to 5 countries seamlessly
Testimonials.t3: Didn't own a single product and made 100,000 Riyals profit

Flow.title: Start in Just 3 Steps
Flow.s1Desc: Create your account for free (email + password)
Flow.s2Desc: Select Seller or Affiliate and receive program details
Flow.s3Desc: Earn money immediately from day one

CTA.title: 🚀 Are you ready to turn your dream into reality?
CTA.desc1: Join 20,000+ merchants who trust COD Network today.
CTA.desc2: Start for free, no credit card required.
